items.name: SalesOrder-to-ERP LogicApp
items.description: Logic App that posts confirmed sales orders to the downstream ERP fulfillment queue via Service Bus when con_fulfillmentpriority is Expedited/Critical.

items.name: con-InvoicePDF-LogicApp
items.description: Azure Logic App triggered on invoice confirmation that renders a branded PDF, stores it in SharePoint, and emails the customer contact.

items.name: Marketing Analytics Export Logic App
items.description: Logic App that pulls journey interaction/analytics data and lands it in an Azure Synapse marketing lakehouse for BI reporting.

items.name: DSR Erasure Orchestrator (Logic App)
items.description: Azure Logic App fanning out right-to-erasure deletes to downstream commerce, marketing, and warehouse systems via Service Bus.

items.name: SupplierEDI-IntakeLogicApp
items.description: Azure Logic App receiving EDI 850/855 from suppliers and upserting requisition/PO acknowledgements via the Dataverse connector.

items.name: ChannelDataPublish-LogicApp
items.description: Logic App that receives publish requests and calls the Commerce runtime API to trigger a channel data (1070) sync job to the Commerce Scale Unit.

items.name: Offboarding-to-ServiceNow Logic App
items.description: Logic App invoked by the termination flow that files an offboarding ticket in ServiceNow and revokes third-party SaaS access on worker termination.

items.name: svc-sentiment-scoring-fn
items.description: Azure Function wrapping Azure AI Language sentiment analysis; called from the CSAT sync flow to score free-text survey comments before writing con_sentiment.

items.name: IoT-Alert-To-WorkOrder-Function
items.description: Azure Function triggered by IoT Hub device alerts (Connected Field Service) that creates a work order and links the affected customer asset.

items.name: fx-rate-ingest-func
items.description: Azure Function that fetches daily FX rates from an external provider and pushes them into the Exchange Rate Sync cloud flow.

items.name: FinanceBudgetSyncFunction
items.description: Azure Function brokering dual-write reconciliation of channel budget lines from Dynamics 365 Finance.

items.name: CoE Inventory Sync Function
items.description: Timer-triggered Azure Function calling the Power Platform Admin API + Microsoft Graph to upsert environment and capacity data into con_environmentinventory nightly.

items.name: F&O Dual-Write: Customer & Invoice
items.dataExchanged: Dual-write mapping surfacing F&O customer payments/settlements (con_custtranspayment) and syncing invoice status back into Sales.

items.name: warranty-dualwrite-agreement
items.dataExchanged: Dual-write / virtual-entity integration surfacing Finance & Operations warranty and service agreements into Dataverse for warranty lookups on cases.

items.name: FandO-DualWrite-Procurement
items.dataExchanged: Dual-write integration surfacing F&O purchase orders and vendors into Dataverse for truck stock replenishment.

items.name: ProjectOps-to-FinOps DualWrite
items.dataExchanged: Dual-write mapping synchronizing project contracts, actuals, and vendor invoices between Dataverse and Finance & Operations project accounting.

items.name: F&O Marketing Spend Virtual Entity Provider
items.dataExchanged: Virtual entity data provider surfacing Finance & Operations committed marketing spend/PO lines into Dataverse for budget-vs-actual on campaign briefs.

items.name: OneLake / ADLS Gen2 Ingestion
items.dataExchanged: Microsoft Fabric OneLake and ADLS Gen2 backing storage feeding CI-Data ingestion via Power Query.

items.name: DualWrite-Finance-Sync
items.dataExchanged: Microsoft Dual-write link between D365 Finance & Operations and Dataverse keeping cdm_company, mserp_ledger, mserp_mainaccount, mserp_vendinvoiceheader, and mserp_custpaymentjournalline in near-real-time sync.

items.name: Dual-Write Orchestration
items.dataExchanged: Dual-write mapping synchronizing released products, PO headers/lines, sales order lines, and warehouses bidirectionally between F&O and Dataverse.

items.name: DualWrite-RetailTransactionSync
items.dataExchanged: Dual-write and virtual-entity link surfacing the F&O RetailTransactionTable, RetailStatementTable, and RetailTerminal into Dataverse.

items.name: F&O Dual-Write HR Bridge
items.dataExchanged: Finance & Operations dual-write synchronization surfacing HcmWorker/HcmEmployment/HcmPosition/CompanyInfo into Dataverse cdm_* tables.

items.name: OmnichannelVoiceEventGrid
items.dataExchanged: Azure Communication Services powering the voice channel; call events flow into Omnichannel via Event Grid.

items.name: Dual-Write Ledger Dimension Bridge
items.dataExchanged: Finance & Operations dual-write / virtual entity surfacing F&O financial dimensions into Dataverse for cross-app cost-center reconciliation.
